title: Archived 2-MBS - Canada.ca
content:
This substance was identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP).
- Summary of publications
Final screening assessment
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
Benzenesulfonamide, 2-methyl-
None planned at this time
Publication of the final screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette, Part I: Vol. 151, No 46 .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette, Part I: Vol. 151, No. 6 .
